title: pyrus tumetica
intro: Pyrus tumetica, also known as the Korean Mountain Ash, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its bark and leaves, which contain salicin, a compound similar to aspirin that exhibits anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties. The health benefits of Pyrus tumetica include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as aiding in the treatment of fever and respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Pyrus tumetica can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
